commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh To them who were in Bethel, and to them who were in south Ramoth, and to them who were in Jattir, Bethel, "the house of God "as the priests had afforded him protection. (Haydock) It is not certain whether he speaks of a town of Ephraim, or of the cities where the ark and the tabernacle were now fixed. Ramoth, in the tribe of Simeon: (Calmet) there was another in the tribe of Gad. (Menochius) Jet her, or "Jethira "(Eusebius) a priests' town, called Ether, Josue xv.
